headline: These 4 ETFs Generate $6,000 a Year in Monthly Income for Retirement Investors
summary: Four ETFs, each yielding above 6%, each paying monthly. On a $100,000 investment spread across these funds, the income math works out to more than $6,000 a year before taxes. That kind of cash flow is what income investors are hunting for, especially with the 10-year Treasury sitting at 4.13% and the Fed Funds Rate ... headline: RTX Rare Earths Push And Engine Win Reshape Defense Spending Exposure
summary: RTX (NYSE:RTX) has been selected for a Pentagon backed effort to rebuild North American capacity for critical rare earth metals used in defense systems. The company is involved in projects aimed at improving supply chain resilience for U.S. and allied defense technology that currently relies heavily on Chinese sources. Pratt & Whitney, an RTX business unit, secured a follow on contract to supply compact turbojet engines for small cruise missiles that use advanced additive manufacturing...
